title: Xellwood
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Xellwood''' was type of wood, smooth and strong, with a purplish coloration. The table where the [[Unity of Community]]'s [[Unity Council|ruling circle]] sat was fashioned from xellwood.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]

{{Interlang
|de=Xell
|fi=Xell-lankku
}}
